profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account details for the current session.

changePin.title: Change password
changePin.subtitle: Enter your current password and pick a new one.

admin.title: Users
admin.subtitle: Manage accounts, roles and system access.

fields.loginHelp: Latin letters, digits and ".", "-", "_". 32 characters max.
fields.pinEditHelp: Leave empty to keep the current password. Digits only, 4–12 characters.
fields.dccPoolHelp: At least one range from {{min}} to {{max}}. Ranges must not overlap another user's pool.

deactivate.title: Deactivate user "{{login}}"?
deactivate.message: The account stays in the database but the user can no longer log in. You can restore access at any time with "Activate".

activate.title: Activate user "{{login}}"?
activate.message: Once active, the user can log in again.

delete.title: Delete user "{{login}}"?
delete.message: This action cannot be undone. To delete the account the user must not own any vehicles or trains.
